subject: M crashes during refinement with cudaErrorIllegalAddress
body:
Hello M board 

I am trying to run an my first M refinement In version(1.0.9) on  a 
particle with d2 symmetry and 30K particles about 200A in size  . I am able 
to start the refinement in M  and it calculates for a while completes upto 
the 3 rd iteration of CTFRefinement but crashes with the following error .

In the main context 
Couldn't start MRARefinement ( I have lost this log messge when the GUI 
closed)

In the Warp worker

System.Exception: cudaErrorIllegalAddress
   at Warp.GPU.CheckGPUExceptions() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\GPU.cs:line 1175
   at Warp.Movie.PerformMultiParticleRefinement(String workingDirectory, 
ProcessingOptionsMPARefine optionsMPA, Species[] allSpecies, DataSource 
dataSource, Image gainRef, DefectModel defectMap, Action`1 
progressCallback) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Movie.cs:line 7323
   at WarpWorker.Program.Main(String[] args) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpWorker\Program.cs:line 294


I am not able to understand why the error is been thrown  Is it a GPU 
memory issue ? ( I googled around error code 77 cudaErrorIlegallAddress 
https://github.com/cramerlab/warp/blob/21e804c6b362154dae6177f381e48198e599df2c/WarpLib/GPU.cs#L1167
)

I have 4 GPU's with GTX 1080Ti's 11GB with no other processes competing for 
memory 

Has anyone encountered a similar issue ?

Thanks in advance 
Joshua
